---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Feature Description

<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature -->

## 🎯 Problem it Solves

<!-- Describe the problem this feature would solve -->
<!-- Example: "I'm always frustrated when..." -->

## 🚀 Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe how you envision this feature working -->

## 🎨 UI/UX Mockups (Optional)

<!-- Add mockups, wireframes, or sketches if applicable -->

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

<!-- Describe alternative solutions you've considered -->

## 📊 Use Cases

<!-- Describe specific scenarios where this feature would be useful -->

1. Use case 1: ...
2. Use case 2: ...
3. Use case 3: ...

## 🎓 Target Users

- [ ] Students searching for universities
- [ ] Students using AI counselor
- [ ] Contributors to the project
- [ ] Project maintainers
- [ ] Other: _______________

## 📈 Priority Level

How important is this feature to you?

- [ ] Critical (blocking my work)
- [ ] High (significantly improves experience)
- [ ] Medium (nice to have)
- [ ] Low (minor improvement)

## 🔧 Technical Considerations

<!-- If you have technical expertise, suggest implementation approach -->

**Affected Components:**
- [ ] Frontend
- [ ] Backend
- [ ] Database
- [ ] AI/ML
- [ ] Infrastructure
- [ ] Documentation

**Estimated Complexity:**
- [ ] Simple (< 1 day)
- [ ] Medium (1-3 days)
- [ ] Complex (> 3 days)
- [ ] Not sure

## 💪 Contribution

- [ ] I'm willing to implement this feature (with guidance)
- [ ] I can help with design/mockups
- [ ] I can help with testing
- [ ] I can help with documentation

## 📝 Additional Context

<!-- Any other relevant information -->

## ✔️ Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues/discussions
- [ ] I have provided clear description and use cases
- [ ] I have considered alternatives
- [ ] I am open to feedback and discussion
